## Source: amazon-inspector (dde903dbeed027bf706e148f4e85f93dd117d93441dddea76703a801a81a5b2d)
The package @athena-ui-components/dashboard-widget was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (cd6f4504169d430a05157cb90e92553c571b4dea84ee87661ecee59c72f9da43)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@athena-ui-components/dashboard-widget' @ 1.6.18 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
